content: it's very unintuitive for players who don't already know how it works
the exalt directly saying "for the rest of this turn" implies the effect is active without needing to be in an ultra round or after annihilation

I think maybe rather than saying:

__Singularity Warp__: For the rest of this turn

it should be:

If __Singularity Warp__ is active: For the rest of this turn

Alternatively, I think maybe change the tooltip so that instead of:

> If currently in an Ultra Round, activate the "Singularity Warp" effect. Singularity Annihilation also guarantees the next "Singularity Warp" trigger this turn.

it would be:

> If currently in an Ultra Round, "Singularity Warp" effects can be activated. Singularity Annihilation will also activate the next "Singularity Warp" trigger to occur that turn.

Didn't read tooltip while tested her and was confused <:murphy_cake:1408324295180030002> 
Silly players don't read text.

yeah I happened to understand how it works because I got some info from a JP server player and that's how the effect works there, but I saw a few people really confused over why their pursuits weren't working after using arachne exalt

Yes exactly!

We only realized this on Saturday and it was too late to change the ingame text.
We're currently working on a hotfix together to address this and some other stuff

Hi everyone! 

First of all, thank you so much for your selfless contributions to Morimens. Ace has been handling all the work communication here, but I realize I’ve never personally shown up to say thank you — I apologize for that.

I’m joining the group because more and more people have been coming to me with questions about the localization volunteer program. My usual answer has just been, “Oh, go talk to Ace.” I don’t think that’s good as a long-term pattern, so no matter how busy I am, I want to carve out time to actually understand what’s happening here and get to know each of the amazing contributors in this space.

*(A small note: my English isn’t strong, so I have to rely on AI translation to communicate with you all. But I want you to know that everything written here comes straight from the heart.)
We always welcome for you here xD
Understood, dw, I'll try to import it again
Thank you!!

Hey Light! Welcome! I guess I should introduce myself and what I like to do here, then.
At first I joined to give some playtesting and polish to the EN gameplay text, but it quickly became clear that the volunteer project was sorely lacking an organizational structure, so I stepped up to attempt to fill that void.

I call myself the project coordinator, and I run an alternative GitHub repository (image 1) where I (attempt to) take the source files Ace provides and sort them into neat, understandable categories (image 2) with individual, clean, sorted files (image 3) so that volunteers have an easier time finding what they're looking for, and have a Ledger system (image 4) to make sure every volunteer gets properly credited and that volunteers don't step on each other's toes. 😁 

Before this project, I had little experience with Excel, and no understanding of coding, so this task was an exciting learning experience for me. I believe I've spent more time working on this project than I've spent actually playing Morimens 😅 but after hundreds of hours of learning and iterating, I've managed to automate (image 5) a very significant amount of the workflow required to automatically compile volunteer contributions! I'm very proud of that work and I'm grateful to have had this opportunity to learn and be a valuable piece of this community.

I also have been putting in a very significant amount of work being incredibly diligent about playtesting before touching gameplay text, and the community server Mythag University gave me my own section (image 6) where I've been able to crowdsource playtesting, opinions, and such from the wider Morimens community (with generous caution of the terms of the NDA, of course). With this great amount of help, I'm just about ready to present my finished retemplating work on EN Wheels of Destiny (image 7); all that's needed is for me to write a primer for my changes and the reasoning behind them for Ace to review and hopefully work into future translation!

Hello Light, welcome and thank you for the incredible game!
I'm the RU team mod and also one of those three "Morimens RU Info Channel" guys translating the news and Version Outlooks for DC into Russian. Happy to help Mori get better!

Hi!
The new UI isn't in the current version of source sheets yet.

We plan to upload the latest source sheets with all the new content at some point **this week**.
Light and the team are making changes to things right now (including the new E15 talents/Absolute Axiom you mentioned) according to community feedback. 
So I think it would be optimal to wait until they're done with that then update the source sheets, it shouldn't take too long!
@everyone about the source sheets!
Regards and best of luck for you and the entire team, Ace

And presumably volunteers might also see the latter half of the latest main story when we upload those source sheets before everyone else, because we're scheduled to unlock the final part of it in game on the 29th.
So when the new sourcesheets are out, let's discuss unreleased story content here instead of elsewhere! I know you guys are the best and we've already done this several times.
